_notes: Source: hemas-organization (hospital). Target: R4 base Organization (unconstrained). All drifts are relaxations from hemas-specific constraints back to the R4 base. Mandatory licenseNumber extension, mandatory type, mandatory contact all removed. R4 base adds org-1 (error) structural constraint and organization-type example binding.

drifts.description: Mandatory extension licenseNumber[1..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target (R4 base has no extension constraints).
Optional extension accreditationStatus[0..1 mustSupport=true] present in source is removed in target.
Source extension slicing removed in target: source defines slices [licenseNumber, accreditationStatus]; R4 base has no extension slicing.
identifier MustSupport removed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed.

Organization.type MustSupport removed from required element and cardinality relaxed: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false example:organization-type] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed. New example binding added in target.
name MustSupport removed from required element: source [1..1 mustSupport=true] → target [0..1 mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed.
telecom MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false. Optional element.
address MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false. Optional element.
partOf MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false. Optional element.
contact cardinality relaxed and MustSupport removed from required element: source [1..* mustSupport=true] → target [0..* mustSupport=false] (R4 base). Min decreased and MS removed.
contact.purpose MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false. Same extensible:contactentity-type binding preserved in R4 base. MS removed from optional element.
contact.name MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false. MS removed from optional element.
contact.telecom MustSupport removed: source mustSupport=true; R4 base mustSupport=false. MS removed from optional element.
